'''dhadïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabiyeh|arabiyeh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabiyeh|arabiyeh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhadïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhædïfzïfth || dhædïfzïfj || dhædïfzïfsh || dhædïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhadïfdïfzïfth || dhadïfdïfzïfj || dhadïfdïfzïfsh || dhadïfdïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhadïfzïfth || dhadïfzïfj || dhadïfzïfsh || dhadïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhadïffzïffth || dhadïffzïffj || dhadïffzïffsh || dhadïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhadïfzïfïf || dhadïfzïfïf || dhadïfzïfïf || dhadïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhadïfzïfth || dhadïfzïfj || dhadïfzïfsh || dhadïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhadïfzïfïfl || dhadïfzïfïfl || dhadïfzïfïfl || dhadïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhadïfzïfïfïf || dhadïfzïfïfïf || dhadïfzïfïfïf || dhadïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhadïfzïfïfn || dhadïfzïfïfn || dhadïfzïfïfn || dhadïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhadïfzïfïforo || dhadïfzïfïforo || dhadïfzïfïforo || dhadïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
